parsed.production_notes: The image uses a black-and-white stock photograph of a billboard at night. The Japanese text is digitally overlaid, appearing perfectly crisp and flat against the slightly weathered physical board.

scenes.setting: urban night scene, black and white, gritty mood

panels.panel_visual_description: A black and white photograph of a large outdoor billboard structure at night. The billboard face is a flat, slightly weathered rectangular surface. Below the main board, a dark metal support structure is visible. The background features blurred, out-of-focus lights suggesting a busy city street or highway with passing cars. The overall lighting is high-contrast and moody.

scenes.visual_description: A black and white image featuring a large outdoor billboard at night over a blurred city street. The entire face of the billboard is filled with a dense block of Japanese text. The text is bold and black against the white background of the billboard. The contrast between the sharp digital text and the gritty, photographic background creates a striking visual.
scenes.audio_transcript: Narrator says: Speak English fluently with your virtual AI English tutor 😎. Download.
scenes.on_screen_text: Duolingoをやめて、Looraに切り替えました。脳をハックしたみたいな感覚です。72時間で、英語でスターバックスの注文ができるようになりました。10日後には、「え、今なんて？」と5秒おきに思うことなく、エミネムの曲を丸ごと理解できました。没入学習によって、聞くのも話すのもオートモードに。アプリを使い始めて2か月半。今ではネイティブのように話せます。 (I quit Duolingo and switched to Loora. It feels like my brain was hacked. In 72 hours, I was able to order at Starbucks in English. 10 days later, I could understand an entire Eminem song without thinking 'huh, what was that?' every 5 seconds. Through immersive learning, listening and speaking are on auto-mode. Two and a half months since I started using the app. Now I speak like a native.)
